summary: The diff implements nearly all required sections and features for the LAW HQ esports website. All major REQs (1-9) appear to be addressed: global dark/red theme, hero, about, leadership, mission/offers, join, discord, navigation, and footer. Minor concerns exist around the copyright line (dynamic year vs. static '© 2025') and a caffeine.ai attribution added to the footer that was not requested. The core content, links, and structure all appear to match the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Caffeine.ai attribution added to the footer with UTM tracking parameters
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specifies the footer should contain only: LAW HQ name, tagline, placeholder social media icons, and copyright line '© 2025 LAW HQ. All rights reserved.' No third-party attribution was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Dynamic copyright year in footer using JavaScript rather than static '© 2025'
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec explicitly requires the copyright line to read '© 2025 LAW HQ. All rights reserved.' — a static string. The footer summary references a 'dynamic copyright year', which deviates from the exact required text.

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook wired into the app's main entry point
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'No user authentication or login system' is required. While these hooks may be scaffolding, wrapping the entire app in InternetIdentityProvider goes beyond the stated non-goals.

hallucinated_features.description: 'Join Discord' CTA button added directly in the desktop navigation bar
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 specifies the nav should contain the LAW HQ logo/wordmark on the left and anchor links (Home, About, Leadership, Mission, Join, Discord) on the right. No additional Discord CTA button in the navbar was requested.
